# BuildFolderTogether

> A free, real-time collaborative folder structure generator and visual file tree creator for developers.

URL: https://build-folder-together.vercel.app/
GitHub: https://github.com/TinhSsc/BuildFolderTogether

## Overview
BuildFolderTogether is an online Developer Tool (SaaS) that allows software engineers, architects, and teams to visually design directory structures, mock file systems, and generate folder layouts instantly.

## Key Features
- Real-time P2P Collaboration: Multiple users can edit the same folder structure simultaneously using WebRTC.
- Drag & Drop: Intuitive interface for moving files and folders.
- Import/Export ASCII: Paste an ASCII file tree to generate visual folders, or export visual folders to an ASCII tree text.
- ZIP Download: Convert the visual folder structure into a real downloadable `.zip` file.
- Auto .gitkeep: Automatically injects `.gitkeep` files into empty directories to preserve them in Git.

## Use Cases
- Designing Clean Architecture or MVC folder structures before coding.
- Sharing project blueprints with teammates.
- Writing documentation (exporting ASCII trees for README files).
- Bootstrapping new projects quickly via ZIP download.

## Target Audience
Software Developers, Frontend Engineers, Backend Engineers, DevOps, Tech Leads, and Coding Bootcamps.
